message:
Command `
LIBPID=956480

echo "=== LibreLane thread states ==="
for tid in $(ls /proc/$LIBPID/task/ 2>/dev/null); do
    STATE=$(cat /proc/$LIBPID/task/$tid/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2}')
    SC=$(cat /proc/$LIBPID/task/$tid/syscall 2>/dev/null)
    echo "  TID $tid: State=$STATE syscall=[$SC]"
done

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD pipe status ==="
# Check pipe buffer fullness
# This file doesn't exist, but we can try
cat /proc/$LIBPID/fdinfo/11 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== DRT CPU time still frozen? ==="
T1=$(ps -p 956540 -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
sleep 2
T2=$(ps -p 956540 -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "T1=$T1 T2=$T2 (should be different if still computing)"
` executed with exit code 0.

echo ""

echo ""

function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
LIBPID=956480

echo "=== LibreLane thread states ==="
for tid in $(ls /proc/$LIBPID/task/ 2>/dev/null); do
    STATE=$(cat /proc/$LIBPID/task/$tid/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2}')
    SC=$(cat /proc/$LIBPID/task/$tid/syscall 2>/dev/null)
    echo "  TID $tid: State=$STATE syscall=[$SC]"
done

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD pipe status ==="
# Check pipe buffer fullness
# This file doesn't exist, but we can try
cat /proc/$LIBPID/fdinfo/11 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== DRT CPU time still frozen? ==="
T1=$(ps -p 956540 -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
sleep 2
T2=$(ps -p 956540 -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "T1=$T1 T2=$T2 (should be different if still computing)"
